```{r}
resdAnnoyMnPermImp$AllImpuls <- resultsOutImpuls$conditional_permimp

```

###### Plot results

```{r, fig.width=8,fig.height=5.6}
par(mai=c(0,3,0,0))

# plot conditional importance
resultsOutImpuls.conimp <- arrange(resultsOutImpuls$conditional_permimp, desc(row_number()))

pBar <- ggplot(resultsOutImpuls.conimp) + geom_col(aes(x=factor(rownames(resultsOutImpuls.conimp), levels=rownames(resultsOutImpuls.conimp)), y=CondPermImp), fill=mycolours[6], width=0.5) + labs(x="Variable", y="Conditional variable permutation importance (mean change in annoyance)") + ggtitle("All impulsiveness") + theme(text = element_text(family = "serif"), panel.grid=element_line(color = rgb(235, 235, 235, 100, maxColorValue = 255), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = 2)) + coord_flip()
pBar


filename <- "dAnnoyMnAllImpulsConPermimp"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=8, height=5.6, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))
  
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=8, height=5.6, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

Selected metric

```{r}

allImpulsVar <- "dImpulsLoudWZAvg"

```

#### dSQM and loudness comparison

Now the highest importance dSQMs are ranked against each other, controlling for loudness difference.

##### Include dtonal loudness

###### Set variables

```{r}

iVars <- c(allVar, eventVar, ambVar, allSharpVar, allTonLdVar, allFluctVar, allRoughVar, allImpulsVar)
dVar <- "dAnnoyanceMean"

seeds <- c(678321, 9812, 762183, 2378, 20318967)

```

###### Hyperparameter tuning

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}

p <- mtryTune(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2],
             ntrees=ntrees, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)
p

```

Selected hyperparameters

```{r}

ntree <- 251
mtry <- as.integer(length(iVars)/1.6)

```

###### Run model

Train preliminary model

```{r}

nperm <- 5

resultsOutSQMs1 <- crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2], ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutSQMs1$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutSQMs1$OOB_MAE
resultsOutSQMs1$Rsquared

```

Train multiple seeds model

```{r}

resultsOutSQMs1 <- multi_crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds, ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutSQMs1$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutSQMs1$OOB_MAE
resultsOutSQMs1$Rsquared

```

```{r}

# store results
resdAnnoyMnFit['All SQMs inc tonal loud', 'RMSE'] <- resultsOutSQMs1$OOB_RMSE
resdAnnoyMnFit['All SQMs inc tonal loud', 'MAE'] <- resultsOutSQMs1$OOB_MAE
resdAnnoyMnFit['All SQMs inc tonal loud', 'Rsquared'] <- resultsOutSQMs1$Rsquared
resdAnnoyMnPermImp$AllSQMs1 <- resultsOutSQMs1$conditional_permimp

```

###### Plot results

```{r, fig.width=8,fig.height=2.4}
par(mai=c(0,3,0,0))

# plot conditional importance
resultsOutSQMs1.conimp <- arrange(resultsOutSQMs1$conditional_permimp, desc(row_number()))

pBar <- ggplot(resultsOutSQMs1.conimp) + geom_col(aes(x=factor(rownames(resultsOutSQMs1.conimp), levels=rownames(resultsOutSQMs1.conimp)), y=CondPermImp), fill=mycolours[7], width=0.5) + labs(x="Variable", y="Conditional variable permutation importance (mean change in annoyance)") + theme(text = element_text(family = "serif"), panel.grid=element_line(color = rgb(235, 235, 235, 100, maxColorValue = 255), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = 2)) + coord_flip(ylim=c(0, 1.5))
pBar


filename <- "dAnnoyMnAllSQMsTonLdConPermimp"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=8, height=2.4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))
  
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=8, height=2.4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

##### Exclude tonal loudness

###### Set variables

```{r}

iVars <- c(allVar, eventVar, ambVar, allSharpVar, allTonalVar, allFluctVar, allRoughVar, allImpulsVar)
dVar <- "dAnnoyanceMean"

seeds <- c(6782318, 213321465, 51324, 6614, 71238728)

```

###### Hyperparameter tuning

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}

p <- mtryTune(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2],
             ntrees=ntrees, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)
p

```

Selected hyperparameters

```{r}

ntree <- 2501
mtry <- as.integer(length(iVars)/1.6)

```


###### Run model

Train preliminary model

```{r}

nperm <- 5

resultsOutSQMs2 <- crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2], ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutSQMs2$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutSQMs2$OOB_MAE
resultsOutSQMs2$Rsquared

```

Train multiple seeds model

```{r}

resultsOutSQMs2 <- multi_crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds, ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutSQMs2$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutSQMs2$OOB_MAE
resultsOutSQMs2$Rsquared

```

```{r}

# store results
resdAnnoyMnFit['All SQMs no tonal loud', 'RMSE'] <- resultsOutSQMs2$OOB_RMSE
resdAnnoyMnFit['All SQMs no tonal loud', 'MAE'] <- resultsOutSQMs2$OOB_MAE
resdAnnoyMnFit['All SQMs no tonal loud', 'Rsquared'] <- resultsOutSQMs2$Rsquared
resdAnnoyMnPermImp$AllSQMs2 <- resultsOutSQMs2$conditional_permimp

```

###### Plot results

```{r, fig.width=8,fig.height=2.4}
par(mai=c(0,3,0,0))

# plot conditional importance
resultsOutSQMs2.conimp <- arrange(resultsOutSQMs2$conditional_permimp, desc(row_number()))

pBar <- ggplot(resultsOutSQMs2.conimp) + geom_col(aes(x=factor(rownames(resultsOutSQMs2.conimp), levels=rownames(resultsOutSQMs2.conimp)), y=CondPermImp), fill=mycolours[7], width=0.5) + labs(x="Variable", y="Conditional variable permutation importance (mean change in annoyance)") + theme(text = element_text(family = "serif"), panel.grid=element_line(color = rgb(235, 235, 235, 100, maxColorValue = 255), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = 2)) + coord_flip(ylim=c(0, 1.5))
pBar

filename <- "dAnnoyMnAllSQMsNoTonLdConPermimp"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=8, height=2.4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))
  
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=8, height=2.4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

#### dPsychoacoustic annoyance metrics

##### Set variables

```{r}

iVars <- c(ambVar, "dPsychAnnoyWidmann", "dPsychAnnoyMore", "dPsychAnnoyDi", "dPsychAnnoyTorija", "dPsychAnnoyWillemsen", "dPsychAnnoyBoucher", "UASPsychAnnoyWidmann", "UASPsychAnnoyMore", "UASPsychAnnoyDi", "UASPsychAnnoyTorija", "UASPsychAnnoyWillemsen", "UASPsychAnnoyBoucher")
dVar <- "dAnnoyanceMean"

seeds <- c(873278, 23132180, 76510132, 2932730, 23184)


```

##### Hyperparameter tuning

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}

p <- mtryTune(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2],
              ntrees=ntrees, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)
p

```


Selected hyperparameters

```{r}

ntree <- 251
mtry <-  as.integer(length(iVars)/2.25)

```

##### Run model

Train preliminary model

```{r}

nperm <- 5

resultsOutPA <- crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2], ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutPA$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutPA$OOB_MAE
resultsOutPA$Rsquared

```

Train multiple seeds model

```{r}

resultsOutPA <- multi_crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds, ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutPA$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutPA$OOB_MAE
resultsOutPA$Rsquared

```

```{r}

# store results
resdAnnoyMnFit['All Psychoacoustic annoyance', 'RMSE'] <- resultsOutPA$OOB_RMSE
resdAnnoyMnFit['All Psychoacoustic annoyance', 'MAE'] <- resultsOutPA$OOB_MAE
resdAnnoyMnFit['All Psychoacoustic annoyance', 'Rsquared'] <- resultsOutPA$Rsquared
resdAnnoyMnPermImp$AllPA <- resultsOutPA$conditional_permimp

```

##### Plot results

```{r, fig.width=8,fig.height=4}
par(mai=c(0,3,0,0))

# plot conditional importance
resultsOutPA.conimp <- arrange(resultsOutPA$conditional_permimp, desc(row_number()))

pBar <- ggplot(resultsOutPA.conimp) + geom_col(aes(x=factor(rownames(resultsOutPA.conimp), levels=rownames(resultsOutPA.conimp)), y=CondPermImp), fill=mycolours[10], width=0.5) + labs(x="Variable", y="Conditional variable permutation importance (mean change in annoyance)") + theme(text = element_text(family = "serif"), panel.grid=element_line(color = rgb(235, 235, 235, 100, maxColorValue = 255), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = 2)) + coord_flip(ylim=c(0, 1))
pBar

filename <- "dAnnoyMnAllPAConPermimp"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=8, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))
  
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=8, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

### Save the results outputs to file

```{r}

if (savedata){
  utils::write.csv(resdAnnoyMnFit, paste(outDataPath, "\\CRFdAnnoyMnOOBFit.csv", sep=""))
  ii <- 0
  temp = list()
  for (res in resdAnnoyMnPermImp){
    ii <- ii + 1
    temp[[ii]] <- as.data.frame(resdAnnoyMnPermImp[ii])
    names(temp[[ii]]) <- names(resdAnnoyMnPermImp[ii])
  }
  openxlsx2::write_xlsx(temp, paste(outDataPath, "\\CRFdAnnoyMnConPermimp.xlsx",
                                   sep=""),
                       rowNames=TRUE)
}

```

## (Change to) High annoyance

### Initialise results output variables

```{r}
resdHiAnnoyFit <- data.frame(RMSE = numeric(),
                             MAE = numeric(),
                             Rsquared = numeric())
resdHiAnnoyPermImp <- list()

```

### Absolute variables

#### Set variables

```{r}

iVars <- names(stimDataNum)[which(names(stimDataNum) == 'UASEvents'):which(names(stimDataNum) == 'UASPsychAnnoyBoucher')]

dVar <- "dHighAnnoyPc"

seeds <- c(2612618, 6541, 237, 723075032, 786312)

```

#### Hyperparameter tuning

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}

p <- mtryTune(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2],
             ntrees=ntrees, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)
p

filename <- "dHiAnnoyAbsVarsHyperTune"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=12, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))
  
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=12, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}
```

Selected hyperparameters

```{r}

ntree <- 1501
mtry <- as.integer(length(iVars)/1.25)

```

#### Run model

Train preliminary model

```{r}

nperm <- 10

resultsOutAbs <- crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2], ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutAbs$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutAbs$OOB_MAE
resultsOutAbs$Rsquared

```
Train multiple seeds model

```{r}

resultsOutAbs <- multi_crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds, ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutAbs$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutAbs$OOB_MAE
resultsOutAbs$Rsquared

```


```{r}

# store results
resdHiAnnoyFit['Abs vars', 'RMSE'] <- resultsOutAbs$OOB_RMSE
resdHiAnnoyFit['Abs vars', 'MAE'] <- resultsOutAbs$OOB_MAE
resdHiAnnoyFit['Abs vars', 'Rsquared'] <- resultsOutAbs$Rsquared
resdHiAnnoyPermImp$AbsVars <- resultsOutAbs$conditional_permimp

```

#### Plot results

```{r, fig.width=8,fig.height=16}
par(mai=c(0,3,0,0))

# plot conditional importance
resultsOutAbs.conimp <- arrange(resultsOutAbs$conditional_permimp, desc(row_number()))

pBar <- ggplot(resultsOutAbs.conimp) + geom_col(aes(x=factor(rownames(resultsOutAbs.conimp), levels=rownames(resultsOutAbs.conimp)), y=CondPermImp), fill=mycolours[1], width=0.5) + labs(x="Variable", y="Conditional variable permutation importance (% highly annoyed)") + theme(text = element_text(family = "serif"), panel.grid=element_line(color = rgb(235, 235, 235, 100, maxColorValue = 255), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = 2)) +
  coord_flip()
pBar

filename <- "dHiAnnoyAbsVarsConPermimp"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=8, height=16, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))
  
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=8, height=16, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

```{r, fig.width=8,fig.height=14}

# Plot only positive values
resultsOutAbs.conimpPtv <- resultsOutAbs.conimp |>
                                          rownames_to_column('Metric') |>
                                                filter_if(is.numeric, all_vars(. > 0)) |>
                                                      column_to_rownames('Metric')

pBar <- ggplot(resultsOutAbs.conimpPtv,) + geom_col(aes(x=factor(rownames(resultsOutAbs.conimpPtv), levels=rownames(resultsOutAbs.conimpPtv)), y=CondPermImp), fill=mycolours[1], width=0.5) + labs(x="Variable", y="Conditional variable permutation importance (% highly annoyed)") + theme(text = element_text(family = "serif"), panel.grid=element_line(color = rgb(235, 235, 235, 100, maxColorValue = 255), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = 2)) + coord_flip()
pBar

filename <- "dHiAnnoyAbsVarsConPermimpPtv"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=12, height=14, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))
  
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=12, height=14, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}


```


```{r, fig.width=8,fig.height=4}

# Plot only values within 1% of the maximum
resultsOutAbs.conimp1pc <- resultsOutAbs.conimp |>
                                          rownames_to_column('Metric') |>
                                                filter_if(is.numeric, all_vars(. > max(resultsOutAbs.conimp)/100)) |>
                                                      column_to_rownames('Metric')

pBar <- ggplot(resultsOutAbs.conimp1pc,) + geom_col(aes(x=factor(rownames(resultsOutAbs.conimp1pc), levels=rownames(resultsOutAbs.conimp1pc)), y=CondPermImp), fill=mycolours[1], width=0.5) + labs(x="Variable", y="Conditional variable permutation importance (% highly annoyed)") + theme(text = element_text(family = "serif"), panel.grid=element_line(color = rgb(235, 235, 235, 100, maxColorValue = 255), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = 2)) + coord_flip()
pBar

filename <- "dHiAnnoyAbsVarsConPermimp1pc"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=12, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))
  
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=12, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

Selected metric

```{r}

absVar <- "UASLAF50ExMaxLR"

```

### SQM analysis

#### Individual SQMs

##### Sharpness

###### Set variables

```{r}

iVars <- c(absVar, eventVar, ambVar, "UASSharpAurISO3PowAvg", "UASSharpAurISO305Ex", "UASSharpAurSHMPowAvg", "UASSharpAurSHM05Ex", "UASSharpAurISO1PowAvg", "UASSharpAurISO105Ex", "UASSharpvBISO1PowAvg", "UASSharpvBISO105Ex", "UASSharpDINPowAvg", "UASSharpDIN05Ex", "UASSharpAurISO1Med",
         "UASTonShpAurSHMPowAvg", "UASTonShpAurSHM05Ex")
dVar <- "dHighAnnoyPc"

seeds <- c(832178, 1352546, 6854, 64014, 78523)

```

###### Hyperparameter tuning

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}

p <- mtryTune(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2],
             ntrees=ntrees, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)
p


```

Selected hyperparameters

```{r}

ntree <- 1501
mtry <- as.integer(length(iVars)/1.25)

```

###### Run model

Train preliminary model

```{r}

nperm <- 5

resultsOutSharp <- crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2], ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutSharp$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutSharp$OOB_MAE
resultsOutSharp$Rsquared

```

Train multiple seeds model

```{r}

resultsOutSharp <- multi_crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds, ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutSharp$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutSharp$OOB_MAE
resultsOutSharp$Rsquared

```


```{r}

# store results
resdHiAnnoyFit['Abs sharp', 'RMSE'] <- resultsOutSharp$OOB_RMSE
resdHiAnnoyFit['Abs sharp', 'MAE'] <- resultsOutSharp$OOB_MAE
resdHiAnnoyFit['Abs sharp', 'Rsquared'] <- resultsOutSharp$Rsquared
resdHiAnnoyPermImp$AbsSharp <- resultsOutSharp$conditional_permimp

```

###### Plot results

```{r, fig.width=8,fig.height=4.9}
par(mai=c(0,3,0,0))

# plot conditional importance
resultsOutSharp.conimp <- arrange(resultsOutSharp$conditional_permimp, desc(row_number()))

pBar <- ggplot(resultsOutSharp.conimp) + geom_col(aes(x=factor(rownames(resultsOutSharp.conimp), levels=rownames(resultsOutSharp.conimp)), y=CondPermImp), fill=mycolours[2], width=0.5) + labs(x="Variable", y="Conditional variable permutation importance (% highly annoyed)") + ggtitle("Sharpness") + theme(text = element_text(family = "serif"), panel.grid=element_line(color = rgb(235, 235, 235, 100, maxColorValue = 255), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = 2)) + coord_flip()
pBar

filename <- "dHiAnnoySharpConPermimp"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=8, height=4.9, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))
  
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=8, height=4.9, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

Selected metric

```{r}

sharpVar <- "UASSharpvBISO105Ex"

```


##### Tonal loudness and tonality

###### Set variables

```{r}

iVars <- c(absVar, eventVar, ambVar, "UASTonalECMAAvg", "UASTonalSHMInt05Ex", "UASTonalSHMIntAvg", "UASTonalECMA05Ex", "UASTonalAwSHMAvg",	"UASTonalAwSHM05Ex",	"UASTonalAwSHMIntAvg", 	"UASTonalAwSHMInt05Ex", "UASTonLdECMAPowAvg", "UASTonLdECMA05Ex", "UASTonalAurAvg", "UASTonalAur05Ex", "UASTonalAur10Ex",
         "UASTonShpAurSHMPowAvg", "UASTonShpAurSHM05Ex")
dVar <- "dHighAnnoyPc"

seeds <- c(8654, 6854, 3512864, 418650, 645098)

```

###### Hyperparameter tuning

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}

p <- mtryTune(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2],
             ntrees=ntrees, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)
p

```

Selected hyperparameters

```{r}

ntree <- 5501
mtry <- as.integer(length(iVars)/1.25)

```

###### Run model

Train preliminary model

```{r}
# Tonality with tonal loudness

nperm <- 5

resultsOutTonal1 <- crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2], ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutTonal1$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutTonal1$OOB_MAE
resultsOutTonal1$Rsquared
```

Train multiple seeds model

```{r}
# Tonality with tonal loudness

resultsOutTonal1 <- multi_crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds, ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutTonal1$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutTonal1$OOB_MAE
resultsOutTonal1$Rsquared

```

```{r}
# store results
resdHiAnnoyFit['Abs tonal inc loud', 'RMSE'] <- resultsOutTonal1$OOB_RMSE
resdHiAnnoyFit['Abs tonal inc loud', 'MAE'] <- resultsOutTonal1$OOB_MAE
resdHiAnnoyFit['Abs tonal inc loud', 'Rsquared'] <- resultsOutTonal1$Rsquared
resdHiAnnoyPermImp$AbsTonal1 <- resultsOutTonal1$conditional_permimp

```

###### Plot results

```{r, fig.width=8,fig.height=4.4}

par(mai=c(0,3,0,0))

# plot conditional importance
resultsOutTonal1.conimp <- arrange(resultsOutTonal1$conditional_permimp, desc(row_number()))

pBar <- ggplot(resultsOutTonal1.conimp) + geom_col(aes(x=factor(rownames(resultsOutTonal1.conimp), levels=rownames(resultsOutTonal1.conimp)), y=CondPermImp), fill=mycolours[3], width=0.5) + labs(x="Variable", y="Conditional variable permutation importance (% highly annoyed)") + ggtitle("Tonality inc. tonal loudness") + theme(text = element_text(family = "serif"), panel.grid=element_line(color = rgb(235, 235, 235, 100, maxColorValue = 255), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = 2)) + coord_flip(ylim=c(0, 400))
pBar

filename <- "dHiAnnoyTonalLdConPermimp"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=8, height=4.4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))
  
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=8, height=4.4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

Selected metric

```{r}

tonLdVar <- "UASTonLdECMAPowAvg"

```


##### Tonality without tonal loudness

###### Set variables

```{r}

iVars <- c(absVar, eventVar, ambVar, "UASTonalECMAAvg", "UASTonalSHMInt05Ex", "UASTonalSHMIntAvg", "UASTonalECMA05Ex", "UASTonalAwSHMAvg",	"UASTonalAwSHM05Ex",	"UASTonalAwSHMIntAvg", "UASTonalAwSHMInt05Ex",	"UASTonalAurAvg", "UASTonalAur05Ex", "UASTonalAur10Ex")
dVar <- "dHighAnnoyPc"

seeds <- c(418659, 654641, 58541, 793265, 846951)

```

###### Hyperparameter tuning

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}

p <- mtryTune(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2],
             ntrees=ntrees, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)
p

```

Selected hyperparameters

```{r}

ntree <- 251
mtry <- as.integer(length(iVars)/1.25)

```


###### Run model

Train preliminary model

```{r}
# Tonality

nperm <- 5

resultsOutTonal2 <- crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2],
                           ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm,
                           minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutTonal2$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutTonal2$OOB_MAE
resultsOutTonal2$Rsquared

```

Train multiple seeds model

```{r}
# Tonality

resultsOutTonal2 <- multi_crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds, ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutTonal2$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutTonal2$OOB_MAE
resultsOutTonal2$Rsquared

```


```{r}

# store results
resdHiAnnoyFit['Abs tonal no loud', 'RMSE'] <- resultsOutTonal2$OOB_RMSE
resdHiAnnoyFit['Abs tonal no loud', 'MAE'] <- resultsOutTonal2$OOB_MAE
resdHiAnnoyFit['Abs tonal no loud', 'Rsquared'] <- resultsOutTonal2$Rsquared
resdHiAnnoyPermImp$AbsTonal2 <- resultsOutTonal2$conditional_permimp

```

###### Plot results

```{r, fig.width=8,fig.height=3.8}
par(mai=c(0,3,0,0))

# plot conditional importance
resultsOutTonal2.conimp <- arrange(resultsOutTonal2$conditional_permimp, desc(row_number()))

pBar <- ggplot(resultsOutTonal2.conimp) + geom_col(aes(x=factor(rownames(resultsOutTonal2.conimp), levels=rownames(resultsOutTonal2.conimp)), y=CondPermImp), fill=mycolours[3], width=0.5) + labs(x="Variable", y="Conditional variable permutation importance (% highly annoyed)") + ggtitle("Tonality w/o tonal loudness") + theme(text = element_text(family = "serif"), panel.grid=element_line(color = rgb(235, 235, 235, 100, maxColorValue = 255), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = 2)) + coord_flip(ylim=c(0, 400))
pBar

filename <- "dHiAnnoyTonalConPermimp"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=8, height=3.8, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))
  
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=8, height=3.8, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

Selected metric

```{r}

tonalVar <- "UASTonalECMA05Ex"

```

##### Fluctuation strength

###### Set variables

```{r}

# Fluctuation strength
iVars <- c(absVar, eventVar, ambVar, "UASFluctOldSHM10Ex", "UASFluctOldSHM05Ex", "UASFluctECMA10Ex", "UASFluctECMA05Ex", "UASFluctFZ10Ex", "UASFluctFZ05Ex", "UASFluctOV10Ex", "UASFluctOV05Ex")
dVar <- "dHighAnnoyPc"

seeds <- c(46851, 78220178, 18659, 792530, 312789)

```

###### Hyperparameter tuning

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}

p <- mtryTune(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2],
             ntrees=ntrees, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)
p

```

Selected hyperparameters

```{r}

ntree <- 1001
mtry <- as.integer(length(iVars)/1.25)

```

###### Run model

Train preliminary model

```{r}

nperm <- 5

resultsOutFluct <- crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2],
                          ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres,
                          nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutFluct$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutFluct$OOB_MAE
resultsOutFluct$Rsquared

```
Train multiple seeds model

```{r}

resultsOutFluct <- multi_crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds, ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutFluct$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutFluct$OOB_MAE
resultsOutFluct$Rsquared

```


```{r}

# store results
resdHiAnnoyFit['Abs fluct', 'RMSE'] <- resultsOutFluct$OOB_RMSE
resdHiAnnoyFit['Abs fluct', 'MAE'] <- resultsOutFluct$OOB_MAE
resdHiAnnoyFit['Abs fluct', 'Rsquared'] <- resultsOutFluct$Rsquared
resdHiAnnoyPermImp$AbsFluct <- resultsOutFluct$conditional_permimp

```

###### Plot results

```{r, fig.width=8,fig.height=2.9}
par(mai=c(0,3,0,0))

# plot conditional importance
resultsOutFluct.conimp <- arrange(resultsOutFluct$conditional_permimp, desc(row_number()))

pBar <- ggplot(resultsOutFluct.conimp) + geom_col(aes(x=factor(rownames(resultsOutFluct.conimp), levels=rownames(resultsOutFluct.conimp)), y=CondPermImp), fill=mycolours[4], width=0.5) + labs(x="Variable", y="Conditional variable permutation importance (% highly annoyed)") + ggtitle("Fluctuation strength") + theme(text = element_text(family = "serif"), panel.grid=element_line(color = rgb(235, 235, 235, 100, maxColorValue = 255), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = 2)) + coord_flip()
pBar

filename <- "dHiAnnoyFluctConPermimp"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=8, height=2.9, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))
  
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=8, height=2.9, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

Selected metric

```{r}

fluctVar <- "UASFluctOV10Ex"

```

##### Roughness

###### Set variables

```{r}

# Roughness
iVars <- c(absVar, eventVar, ambVar, "UASRoughECMA10Ex", "UASRoughECMA05Ex", "UASRoughFZ10Ex", "UASRoughFZ05Ex", "UASRoughDW10Ex", "UASRoughDW05Ex")
dVar <- "dHighAnnoyPc"

seeds <- c(849651, 105362, 8, 58641, 615)

```

###### Hyperparameter tuning

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}

p <- mtryTune(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2],
             ntrees=ntrees, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)
p

```

Selected hyperparameters

```{r}

ntree <- 5501
mtry <- as.integer(length(iVars)/1.25)

```


###### Run model

Train preliminary model

```{r}

nperm <- 5

resultsOutRough <- crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2], ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutRough$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutRough$OOB_MAE
resultsOutRough$Rsquared

```

Train multiple seeds model

```{r}

resultsOutRough <- multi_crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds, ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutRough$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutRough$OOB_MAE
resultsOutRough$Rsquared

```

```{r}
# store results
resdHiAnnoyFit['Abs rough', 'RMSE'] <- resultsOutRough$OOB_RMSE
resdHiAnnoyFit['Abs rough', 'MAE'] <- resultsOutRough$OOB_MAE
resdHiAnnoyFit['Abs rough', 'Rsquared'] <- resultsOutRough$Rsquared
resdHiAnnoyPermImp$AbsRough <- resultsOutRough$conditional_permimp

```

###### Plot results

```{r, fig.width=8,fig.height=2.9}
par(mai=c(0,3,0,0))

# plot conditional importance
resultsOutRough.conimp <- arrange(resultsOutRough$conditional_permimp, desc(row_number()))

pBar <- ggplot(resultsOutRough.conimp) + geom_col(aes(x=factor(rownames(resultsOutRough.conimp), levels=rownames(resultsOutRough.conimp)), y=CondPermImp), fill=mycolours[5], width=0.5) + labs(x="Variable", y="Conditional variable permutation importance (% highly annoyed)") + ggtitle("Roughness") + theme(text = element_text(family = "serif"), panel.grid=element_line(color = rgb(235, 235, 235, 100, maxColorValue = 255), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = 2)) + coord_flip()
pBar

filename <- "dHiAnnoyRoughConPermimp"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=8, height=2.9, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))
  
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=8, height=2.9, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

Selected metric

```{r}

roughVar <- "UASRoughDW05Ex"

```


##### Impulsiveness

###### Set variables

```{r}
# Impulsiveness
iVars <- c(absVar, eventVar, ambVar, "UASImpulsSHMAvg", "UASImpulsSHM05Ex", "UASImpulsSHMPowAvg", "UASImpulsLoudWZAvg", "UASImpulsLoudWZ05Ex", "UASImpulsLoudWZPowAvg", "UASImpulsLoudWECMAAvg", "UASImpulsLoudWECMA05Ex", "UASImpulsLoudWECMAPowAvg")
dVar <- "dHighAnnoyPc"

seeds <- c(23782, 641095, 3526178, 4865, 36512)

```

###### Hyperparameter tuning

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}

p <- mtryTune(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2],
             ntrees=ntrees, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)
p

```

Selected hyperparameters

```{r}

ntree <- 251
mtry <- as.integer(length(iVars)/1.5)

```


###### Run model

Train preliminary model

```{r}

nperm <- 15

resultsOutImpuls <- crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2], ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutImpuls$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutImpuls$OOB_MAE
resultsOutImpuls$Rsquared

```

Train multiple seeds model

```{r}

resultsOutImpuls <- multi_crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds, ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutImpuls$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutImpuls$OOB_MAE
resultsOutImpuls$Rsquared

```

```{r}

# store results
resdHiAnnoyFit['Abs impuls', 'RMSE'] <- resultsOutImpuls$OOB_RMSE
resdHiAnnoyFit['Abs impuls', 'MAE'] <- resultsOutImpuls$OOB_MAE
resdHiAnnoyFit['Abs impuls', 'Rsquared'] <- resultsOutImpuls$Rsquared
resdHiAnnoyPermImp$AbsImpuls <- resultsOutImpuls$conditional_permimp

```

###### Plot results

```{r, fig.width=8,fig.height=4}
par(mai=c(0,3,0,0))

# plot conditional importance
resultsOutImpuls.conimp <- arrange(resultsOutImpuls$conditional_permimp, desc(row_number()))

pBar <- ggplot(resultsOutImpuls.conimp) + geom_col(aes(x=factor(rownames(resultsOutImpuls.conimp), levels=rownames(resultsOutImpuls.conimp)), y=CondPermImp), fill=mycolours[6], width=0.5) + labs(x="Variable", y="Conditional variable permutation importance (% highly annoyed)") + ggtitle("Impulsiveness") + theme(text = element_text(family = "serif"), panel.grid=element_line(color = rgb(235, 235, 235, 100, maxColorValue = 255), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = 2)) + coord_flip()
pBar

filename <- "dHiAnnoyImpulsConPermimp"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=8, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))
  
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=8, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

Selected metric

```{r}

impulsVar <- "UASImpulsLoudWZAvg"

```

#### SQM and loudness comparison

Now the highest importance SQMs are ranked against each other, controlling for UAS loudness and ambient LAeq.

##### Include tonal loudness

###### Set variables

```{r}

iVars <- c(absVar, eventVar, ambVar, sharpVar, tonLdVar, fluctVar, roughVar, impulsVar)
dVar <- "dHighAnnoyPc"

seeds <- c(419865, 6541851, 4532, 320785, 8546)

```

###### Hyperparameter tuning

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}

p <- mtryTune(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2],
             ntrees=ntrees, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)
p

```

Selected hyperparameters

```{r}

ntree <- 1001
mtry <- mtry <- as.integer(length(iVars)/1.6)

```


###### Run model

Train preliminary model

```{r}

nperm <- 5

resultsOutSQMs1 <- crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2], ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutSQMs1$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutSQMs1$OOB_MAE
resultsOutSQMs1$Rsquared

```

Train multiple seeds model

```{r}

resultsOutSQMs1 <- multi_crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds, ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutSQMs1$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutSQMs1$OOB_MAE
resultsOutSQMs1$Rsquared

```

```{r}

# store results
resdHiAnnoyFit['Abs SQMs inc tonal loud', 'RMSE'] <- resultsOutSQMs1$OOB_RMSE
resdHiAnnoyFit['Abs SQMs inc tonal loud', 'MAE'] <- resultsOutSQMs1$OOB_MAE
resdHiAnnoyFit['Abs SQMs inc tonal loud', 'Rsquared'] <- resultsOutSQMs1$Rsquared
resdHiAnnoyPermImp$AbsSQMs1 <- resultsOutSQMs1$conditional_permimp

```

###### Plot results

```{r, fig.width=8,fig.height=2.4}
par(mai=c(0,3,0,0))

# plot conditional importance
resultsOutSQMs1.conimp <- arrange(resultsOutSQMs1$conditional_permimp, desc(row_number()))

pBar <- ggplot(resultsOutSQMs1.conimp) + geom_col(aes(x=factor(rownames(resultsOutSQMs1.conimp), levels=rownames(resultsOutSQMs1.conimp)), y=CondPermImp), fill=mycolours[7], width=0.5) + labs(x="Variable", y="Conditional variable permutation importance (% highly annoyed)") + theme(text = element_text(family = "serif"), panel.grid=element_line(color = rgb(235, 235, 235, 100, maxColorValue = 255), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = 2)) + coord_flip(ylim=c(0, 120))
pBar


filename <- "dHiAnnoyAbsSQMsTonLdConPermimp"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=8, height=2.4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))
  
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=8, height=2.4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

##### Exclude tonal loudness

###### Set variables

```{r}

iVars <- c(absVar, eventVar, ambVar, sharpVar, tonalVar, fluctVar, roughVar, impulsVar)
dVar <- "dHighAnnoyPc"

seeds <- c(150864, 698541, 30841, 5406854, 20387)

```

###### Hyperparameter tuning

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}

p <- mtryTune(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2],
             ntrees=ntrees, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)
p

```

Selected hyperparameters

```{r}

ntree <- 501
mtry <- as.integer(length(iVars)/1.6)

```


###### Run model

Train preliminary model

```{r}

nperm <- 5

resultsOutSQMs2 <- crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2], ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutSQMs2$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutSQMs2$OOB_MAE
resultsOutSQMs2$Rsquared

```

Train multiple seeds model

```{r}

resultsOutSQMs2 <- multi_crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds, ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutSQMs2$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutSQMs2$OOB_MAE
resultsOutSQMs2$Rsquared

```

```{r}

# store results
resdHiAnnoyFit['Abs SQMs no tonal loud', 'RMSE'] <- resultsOutSQMs2$OOB_RMSE
resdHiAnnoyFit['Abs SQMs no tonal loud', 'MAE'] <- resultsOutSQMs2$OOB_MAE
resdHiAnnoyFit['Abs SQMs no tonal loud', 'Rsquared'] <- resultsOutSQMs2$Rsquared
resdHiAnnoyPermImp$AbsSQMs2 <- resultsOutSQMs2$conditional_permimp

```

###### Plot results

```{r, fig.width=8,fig.height=2.4}
par(mai=c(0,3,0,0))

# plot conditional importance
resultsOutSQMs2.conimp <- arrange(resultsOutSQMs2$conditional_permimp, desc(row_number()))

pBar <- ggplot(resultsOutSQMs2.conimp) + geom_col(aes(x=factor(rownames(resultsOutSQMs2.conimp), levels=rownames(resultsOutSQMs2.conimp)), y=CondPermImp), fill=mycolours[7], width=0.5) + labs(x="Variable", y="Conditional variable permutation importance (% highly annoyed)") + theme(text = element_text(family = "serif"), panel.grid=element_line(color = rgb(235, 235, 235, 100, maxColorValue = 255), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = 2)) + coord_flip(ylim=c(0, 120))
pBar

filename <- "dHiAnnoyAbsSQMsNoTonLdConPermimp"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=8, height=2.4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))
  
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=8, height=2.4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

#### Psychoacoustic annoyance metrics

##### Set variables

```{r}

iVars <- c(ambVar, "UASPsychAnnoyWidmann", "UASPsychAnnoyMore", "UASPsychAnnoyDi", "UASPsychAnnoyTorija", "UASPsychAnnoyWillemsen", "UASPsychAnnoyBoucher")
dVar <- "dHighAnnoyPc"

seeds <- c(865414, 7180, 6513, 973, 79320)


```

##### Hyperparameter tuning

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}

p <- mtryTune(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2],
             ntrees=ntrees, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)
p

```


Selected hyperparameters

```{r}

ntree <- 251
mtry <- as.integer(length(iVars)/1.75)

```

##### Run model

Train preliminary model

```{r}

nperm <- 5

resultsOutPA <- crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2], ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutPA$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutPA$OOB_MAE
resultsOutPA$Rsquared

```

Train multiple seeds model

```{r}

resultsOutPA <- multi_crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds, ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutPA$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutPA$OOB_MAE
resultsOutPA$Rsquared

```

```{r}

# store results
resdHiAnnoyFit['Psychoacoustic annoyance', 'RMSE'] <- resultsOutPA$OOB_RMSE
resdHiAnnoyFit['Psychoacoustic annoyance', 'MAE'] <- resultsOutPA$OOB_MAE
resdHiAnnoyFit['Psychoacoustic annoyance', 'Rsquared'] <- resultsOutPA$Rsquared
resdHiAnnoyPermImp$AbsPA <- resultsOutPA$conditional_permimp

```

##### Plot results

```{r, fig.width=8,fig.height=2.4}
par(mai=c(0,3,0,0))

# plot conditional importance
resultsOutPA.conimp <- arrange(resultsOutPA$conditional_permimp, desc(row_number()))

pBar <- ggplot(resultsOutPA.conimp) + geom_col(aes(x=factor(rownames(resultsOutPA.conimp), levels=rownames(resultsOutPA.conimp)), y=CondPermImp), fill=mycolours[10], width=0.5) + labs(x="Variable", y="Conditional variable permutation importance (% highly annoyed)") + theme(text = element_text(family = "serif"), panel.grid=element_line(color = rgb(235, 235, 235, 100, maxColorValue = 255), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = 2)) + coord_flip(ylim=c(0, 150))
pBar


filename <- "dHiAnnoyAbsPAConPermimp"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=8, height=2.4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))
  
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=8, height=2.4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

### All variables (absolute and difference)

#### Set variables

```{r}

iVars <- names(stimDataNum)[which(names(stimDataNum) == 'UASEvents'):which(names(stimDataNum) == 'dPsychAnnoyBoucher')]

dVar <- "dHighAnnoyPc"

seeds <- c(649851, 60, 732, 52537, 160598)

```

#### Hyperparameter tuning

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}

p <- mtryTune(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2],
              ntrees=ntrees, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)
p

```

Selected hyperparameters

```{r}

ntree <- 251
mtry <- as.integer(length(iVars)/2.25)

```

#### Run model

Train preliminary model

```{r}

nperm <- 10

resultsOutAbsDiffs <- crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2], ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutAbsDiffs$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutAbsDiffs$OOB_MAE
resultsOutAbsDiffs$Rsquared

```

Train multiple seeds model

```{r}

resultsOutAbsDiffs <- multi_crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds, ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutAbsDiffs$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutAbsDiffs$OOB_MAE
resultsOutAbsDiffs$Rsquared
```

```{r}
# store results
resdHiAnnoyFit['All vars', 'RMSE'] <- resultsOutAbsDiffs$OOB_RMSE
resdHiAnnoyFit['All vars', 'MAE'] <- resultsOutAbsDiffs$OOB_MAE
resdHiAnnoyFit['All vars', 'Rsquared'] <- resultsOutAbsDiffs$Rsquared
resdHiAnnoyPermImp$AllVars <- resultsOutAbsDiffs$conditional_permimp

```

#### Plot results

```{r, fig.width=8,fig.height=33}
par(mai=c(0,3,0,0))

# plot conditional importance
resultsOutAbsDiffs.conimp <- arrange(resultsOutAbsDiffs$conditional_permimp, desc(row_number()))

pBar <- ggplot(resultsOutAbsDiffs.conimp) + geom_col(aes(x=factor(rownames(resultsOutAbsDiffs.conimp), levels=rownames(resultsOutAbsDiffs.conimp)), y=CondPermImp), fill=mycolours[9], width=0.5) + labs(x="Variable", y="Conditional variable permutation importance (% highly annoyed)") + theme(text = element_text(family = "serif"), panel.grid=element_line(color = rgb(235, 235, 235, 100, maxColorValue = 255), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = 2)) + coord_flip()
pBar

filename <- "dHiAnnoyAllVarsConPermimp"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=8, height=33, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))
  
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=8, height=33, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

```{r, fig.width=8,fig.height=24}

# Plot only positive values

resultsOutAbsDiffs.conimpPtv <- resultsOutAbsDiffs.conimp |>
                                          rownames_to_column('Metric') |>
                                                filter_if(is.numeric, all_vars(. > 0)) |>
                                                      column_to_rownames('Metric')

pBar <- ggplot(resultsOutAbsDiffs.conimpPtv) + geom_col(aes(x=factor(rownames(resultsOutAbsDiffs.conimpPtv), levels=rownames(resultsOutAbsDiffs.conimpPtv)), y=CondPermImp), fill=mycolours[9], width=0.5) + labs(x="Variable", y="Conditional variable permutation importance (% highly annoyed)") + theme(text = element_text(family = "serif"), panel.grid=element_line(color = rgb(235, 235, 235, 100, maxColorValue = 255), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = 2)) + coord_flip()
pBar

filename <- "dHiAnnoyAllVarsConPermimpPtv"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=12, height=24, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))
  
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=12, height=24, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```


```{r, fig.width=8,fig.height=6.5}

# Plot only values within 1% of the maximum

resultsOutAbsDiffs.conimp1pc <- resultsOutAbsDiffs.conimp |>
                                          rownames_to_column('Metric') |>
                                                filter_if(is.numeric, all_vars(. > max(resultsOutAbsDiffs.conimp)/100)) |>
                                                      column_to_rownames('Metric')

pBar <- ggplot(resultsOutAbsDiffs.conimp1pc) + geom_col(aes(x=factor(rownames(resultsOutAbsDiffs.conimp1pc), levels=rownames(resultsOutAbsDiffs.conimp1pc)), y=CondPermImp), fill=mycolours[9], width=0.5) + labs(x="Variable", y="Conditional variable permutation importance (% highly annoyed)") + theme(text = element_text(family = "serif"), panel.grid=element_line(color = rgb(235, 235, 235, 100, maxColorValue = 255), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = 2)) + coord_flip()
pBar


filename <- "dHiAnnoyAllVarsConPermimp1pc"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=12, height=6.5, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))
  
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=12, height=6.5, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

Selected metric

```{r}

allVar <- "UASLoudISO1PowAvg"

```

### dSQM analysis

#### Individual SQMs

##### dSharpness

###### Set variables

```{r}

iVars <- c(allVar, eventVar, ambVar, "dSharpAurISO3PowAvg", "dSharpAurISO305Ex", "dSharpAurSHMPowAvg", "dSharpAurSHM05Ex", "dTonShpAurSHMPowAvg", "dTonShpAurSHM05Ex", "PartTonShpAurSHMPowAvg",
           "PartTonShpAurSHM05Ex", "PartTonShpvBSHMPowAvg",
           "PartTonShpvBSHM05Ex", "PartTonShpWidSHMPowAvg",
           "PartTonShpWidSHM05Ex", "PartSharpAurSHMPowAvg",
           "PartSharpAurSHM05Ex", "PartSharpvBSHMPowAvg",
           "PartSharpvBSHM05Ex", "PartSharpWidSHMPowAvg",
           "PartSharpWidSHM05Ex", "UASSharpAurISO3PowAvg", "UASSharpAurISO305Ex", "UASSharpAurSHMPowAvg", "UASSharpAurSHM05Ex", "UASSharpAurISO1PowAvg", "UASSharpAurISO105Ex", "UASSharpvBISO1PowAvg", "UASSharpvBISO105Ex", "UASSharpDINPowAvg", "UASSharpDIN05Ex", "UASSharpAurISO1Med",
         "UASTonShpAurSHMPowAvg", "UASTonShpAurSHM05Ex")
dVar <- "dHighAnnoyPc"

seeds <- c(9864, 65341, 468951, 410856, 288649, 7419)

```

###### Hyperparameter tuning

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}

p <- mtryTune(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2],
             ntrees=ntrees, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)
p

```

Selected hyperparameters

```{r}

ntree <- 4001
mtry <- as.integer(length(iVars)/1.25)

```


###### Run model

Train preliminary model

```{r}

nperm <- 5

resultsOutSharp <- crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2], ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutSharp$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutSharp$OOB_MAE
resultsOutSharp$Rsquared

```
Train multiple seeds model

```{r}

resultsOutSharp <- multi_crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds, ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutSharp$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutSharp$OOB_MAE
resultsOutSharp$Rsquared

```


```{r}
# store results
resdHiAnnoyFit['All sharp', 'RMSE'] <- resultsOutSharp$OOB_RMSE
resdHiAnnoyFit['All sharp', 'MAE'] <- resultsOutSharp$OOB_MAE
resdHiAnnoyFit['All sharp', 'Rsquared'] <- resultsOutSharp$Rsquared
resdHiAnnoyPermImp$AllSharp <- resultsOutSharp$conditional_permimp

```

###### Plot results

```{r, fig.width=8,fig.height=8}
par(mai=c(0,3,0,0))

# plot conditional importance
resultsOutSharp.conimp <- arrange(resultsOutSharp$conditional_permimp, desc(row_number()))

pBar <- ggplot(resultsOutSharp.conimp) + geom_col(aes(x=factor(rownames(resultsOutSharp.conimp), levels=rownames(resultsOutSharp.conimp)), y=CondPermImp), fill=mycolours[2], width=0.5) + labs(x="Variable", y="Conditional variable permutation importance (% highly annoyed)") + ggtitle("All sharpness") + theme(text = element_text(family = "serif"), panel.grid=element_line(color = rgb(235, 235, 235, 100, maxColorValue = 255), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = 2)) + coord_flip()
pBar

filename <- "dHiAnnoyAllSharpConPermimp"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=8, height=8, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))
  
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=8, height=8, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

Selected metric

```{r}

allSharpVar <- "UASSharpAurISO1Med"

```


##### dTonal loudness and dtonality

###### Set variables

```{r}

iVars <- c(allVar, eventVar, ambVar, "dTonalECMAAvg", "dTonalSHMInt05Ex", "dTonalSHMIntAvg", "dTonalECMA05Ex", "dTonalAwSHMAvg",	"dTonalAwSHM05Ex",	"dTonalAwSHMIntAvg", 	"dTonalAwSHMInt05Ex", "dTonLdECMAPowAvg", "dTonLdECMA05Ex", "dTonShpAurSHMPowAvg",
           "dTonShpAurSHM05Ex", "PartTonLdSHMPowAvg", "UASTonalECMAAvg", "UASTonalSHMInt05Ex", "UASTonalSHMIntAvg", "UASTonalECMA05Ex", "UASTonalAwSHMAvg",	"UASTonalAwSHM05Ex",	"UASTonalAwSHMIntAvg", 	"UASTonalAwSHMInt05Ex", "UASTonLdECMAPowAvg", "UASTonLdECMA05Ex", "UASTonalAurAvg", "UASTonalAur05Ex", "UASTonalAur10Ex",
         "UASTonShpAurSHMPowAvg", "UASTonShpAurSHM05Ex")
dVar <- "dHighAnnoyPc"

```

###### Hyperparameter tuning

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}

p <- mtryTune(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2],
             ntrees=ntrees, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)
p

seeds <- c(2184874, 89684, 1065484, 854, 37646541)

```
Selected hyperparameters

```{r}

ntree <- 501
mtry <- as.integer(length(iVars)/1.25)

```

###### Run model

Train preliminary model

```{r}
# Tonality with tonal loudness

nperm <- 5

resultsOutTonal1 <- crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2], ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutTonal1$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutTonal1$OOB_MAE
resultsOutTonal1$Rsquared
```

Train multiple seeds model

```{r}
# Tonality with tonal loudness

resultsOutTonal1 <- multi_crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds, ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutTonal1$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutTonal1$OOB_MAE
resultsOutTonal1$Rsquared

```

```{r}

# store results
resdHiAnnoyFit['All tonal inc loud', 'RMSE'] <- resultsOutTonal1$OOB_RMSE
resdHiAnnoyFit['All tonal inc loud', 'MAE'] <- resultsOutTonal1$OOB_MAE
resdHiAnnoyFit['All tonal inc loud', 'Rsquared'] <- resultsOutTonal1$Rsquared
resdHiAnnoyPermImp$AllTonal1 <- resultsOutTonal1$conditional_permimp

```

###### Plot results

```{r, fig.width=8,fig.height=7}

par(mai=c(0,3,0,0))

# plot conditional importance
resultsOutTonal1.conimp <- arrange(resultsOutTonal1$conditional_permimp, desc(row_number()))

pBar <- ggplot(resultsOutTonal1.conimp) + geom_col(aes(x=factor(rownames(resultsOutTonal1.conimp), levels=rownames(resultsOutTonal1.conimp)), y=CondPermImp), fill=mycolours[3], width=0.5) + labs(x="Variable", y="Conditional variable permutation importance (% highly annoyed)") + ggtitle("All tonality inc. tonal loudness") + theme(text = element_text(family = "serif"), panel.grid=element_line(color = rgb(235, 235, 235, 100, maxColorValue = 255), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = 2)) + coord_flip(ylim=c(0, 350))
pBar

filename <- "dHiAnnoyAllTonalLdConPermimp"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=8, height=7, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))
  
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=8, height=7, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

Selected metric

```{r}

allTonLdVar <- "PartTonLdSHMPowAvg"

```

##### dTonality without dtonal loudness

###### Set variables

```{r}

iVars <- c(allVar, eventVar, ambVar, "dTonalECMAAvg", "dTonalSHMInt05Ex", "dTonalSHMIntAvg", "dTonalECMA05Ex", "dTonalAwSHMAvg",	"dTonalAwSHM05Ex",	"dTonalAwSHMIntAvg", 	"dTonalAwSHMInt05Ex", "UASTonalECMAAvg", "UASTonalSHMInt05Ex", "UASTonalSHMIntAvg", "UASTonalECMA05Ex", "UASTonalAwSHMAvg",	"UASTonalAwSHM05Ex",	"UASTonalAwSHMIntAvg", "UASTonalAwSHMInt05Ex",	"UASTonalAurAvg", "UASTonalAur05Ex", "UASTonalAur10Ex")
dVar <- "dHighAnnoyPc"

seeds <- c(4106985, 188519, 536110, 87964, 986541)

```

###### Hyperparameter tuning

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}

p <- mtryTune(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2],
             ntrees=ntrees, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)
p

```

Selected hyperparameters

```{r}

ntree <- 251
mtry <- as.integer(length(iVars)/1.25)

```


###### Run model

Train preliminary model

```{r}
# Tonality

nperm <- 5

resultsOutTonal2 <- crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2], ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutTonal2$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutTonal2$OOB_MAE
resultsOutTonal2$Rsquared

```

Train multiple seeds model

```{r}
# Tonality

resultsOutTonal2 <- multi_crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds, ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutTonal2$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutTonal2$OOB_MAE
resultsOutTonal2$Rsquared

```


```{r}

# store results
resdHiAnnoyFit['All tonal no loud', 'RMSE'] <- resultsOutTonal2$OOB_RMSE
resdHiAnnoyFit['All tonal no loud', 'MAE'] <- resultsOutTonal2$OOB_MAE
resdHiAnnoyFit['All tonal no loud', 'Rsquared'] <- resultsOutTonal2$Rsquared
resdHiAnnoyPermImp$AllTonal2 <- resultsOutTonal2$conditional_permimp

```

###### Plot results

```{r, fig.width=8,fig.height=5}
par(mai=c(0,3,0,0))

# plot conditional importance
resultsOutTonal2.conimp <- arrange(resultsOutTonal2$conditional_permimp, desc(row_number()))

pBar <- ggplot(resultsOutTonal2.conimp) + geom_col(aes(x=factor(rownames(resultsOutTonal2.conimp), levels=rownames(resultsOutTonal2.conimp)), y=CondPermImp), fill=mycolours[3], width=0.5) + labs(x="Variable", y="Conditional variable permutation importance (% highly annoyed)") + ggtitle("All tonality w/o tonal loudness") + theme(text = element_text(family = "serif"), panel.grid=element_line(color = rgb(235, 235, 235, 100, maxColorValue = 255), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = 2)) + coord_flip(ylim=c(0, 400))
pBar


filename <- "dHiAnnoyAllTonalConPermimp"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=8, height=5, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))
  
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=8, height=5, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

Selected metric

```{r}

allTonalVar <- "UASTonalAurAvg"

```

##### dFluctuation strength

###### Set variables

```{r}

# Fluctuation strength
iVars <- c(allVar, eventVar, ambVar, "dFluctECMA10Ex", "dFluctECMA05Ex", "dFluctOV10Ex", "dFluctOV05Ex", "UASFluctOldSHM10Ex", "UASFluctOldSHM05Ex", "UASFluctECMA10Ex", "UASFluctECMA05Ex", "UASFluctFZ10Ex", "UASFluctFZ05Ex", "UASFluctOV10Ex", "UASFluctOV05Ex")
dVar <- "dHighAnnoyPc"

seeds <- c(841489, 152148, 697280, 1537856, 86541)

```


###### Hyperparameter tuning

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}

p <- mtryTune(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2],
             ntrees=ntrees, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)
p

```

Selected hyperparameters

```{r}

ntree <- 5501
mtry <- as.integer(length(iVars)/1.25)

```

###### Run model

Train preliminary model

```{r}

nperm <- 5

resultsOutFluct <- crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2], ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutFluct$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutFluct$OOB_MAE
resultsOutFluct$Rsquared

```

Train multiple seeds model

```{r}

resultsOutFluct <- multi_crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds, ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutFluct$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutFluct$OOB_MAE
resultsOutFluct$Rsquared

```


```{r}

# store results
resdHiAnnoyFit['All fluct', 'RMSE'] <- resultsOutFluct$OOB_RMSE
resdHiAnnoyFit['All fluct', 'MAE'] <- resultsOutFluct$OOB_MAE
resdHiAnnoyFit['All fluct', 'Rsquared'] <- resultsOutFluct$Rsquared
resdHiAnnoyPermImp$AllFluct <- resultsOutFluct$conditional_permimp

```

###### Plot results

```{r, fig.width=8,fig.height=4}
par(mai=c(0,3,0,0))

# plot conditional importance
resultsOutFluct.conimp <- arrange(resultsOutFluct$conditional_permimp, desc(row_number()))

pBar <- ggplot(resultsOutFluct.conimp) + geom_col(aes(x=factor(rownames(resultsOutFluct.conimp), levels=rownames(resultsOutFluct.conimp)), y=CondPermImp), fill=mycolours[4], width=0.5) + labs(x="Variable", y="Conditional variable permutation importance (% highly annoyed)") + ggtitle("All fluctuation strength") + theme(text = element_text(family = "serif"), panel.grid=element_line(color = rgb(235, 235, 235, 100, maxColorValue = 255), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = 2)) + coord_flip()
pBar

filename <- "dHiAnnoyAllFluctConPermimp"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=8, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))
  
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=8, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

Selected metric

```{r}

allFluctVar <- "UASFluctFZ05Ex"

```

##### dRoughness

###### Set variables

```{r}

# Roughness
iVars <- c(allVar, eventVar, ambVar, "dRoughECMA10Ex", "dRoughECMA05Ex", "dRoughFZ10Ex", "dRoughFZ05Ex", "UASRoughECMA10Ex", "UASRoughECMA05Ex", "UASRoughFZ10Ex", "UASRoughFZ05Ex", "UASRoughDW10Ex", "UASRoughDW05Ex")
dVar <- "dHighAnnoyPc"

seeds <- c(854196, 4735, 96452, 3651, 48652)

```

###### Hyperparameter tuning

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}

p <- mtryTune(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2],
             ntrees=ntrees, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)
p

```

Selected hyperparameters

```{r}

ntree <- 251
mtry <- as.integer(length(iVars)/1.25)

```

###### Run model

Train preliminary model

```{r}

nperm <- 5

resultsOutRough <- crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2], ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutRough$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutRough$OOB_MAE
resultsOutRough$Rsquared

```

Train multiple seeds model

```{r}

resultsOutRough <- multi_crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds, ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutRough$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutRough$OOB_MAE
resultsOutRough$Rsquared

```

```{r}
# store results
resdHiAnnoyFit['All rough', 'RMSE'] <- resultsOutRough$OOB_RMSE
resdHiAnnoyFit['All rough', 'MAE'] <- resultsOutRough$OOB_MAE
resdHiAnnoyFit['All rough', 'Rsquared'] <- resultsOutRough$Rsquared
resdHiAnnoyPermImp$AllRough <- resultsOutRough$conditional_permimp

```

###### Plot results

```{r, fig.width=8,fig.height=4}
par(mai=c(0,3,0,0))

# plot conditional importance
resultsOutRough.conimp <- arrange(resultsOutRough$conditional_permimp, desc(row_number()))

pBar <- ggplot(resultsOutRough.conimp) + geom_col(aes(x=factor(rownames(resultsOutRough.conimp), levels=rownames(resultsOutRough.conimp)), y=CondPermImp), fill=mycolours[5], width=0.5) + labs(x="Variable", y="Conditional variable permutation importance (% highly annoyed)") + ggtitle("All roughness") + theme(text = element_text(family = "serif"), panel.grid=element_line(color = rgb(235, 235, 235, 100, maxColorValue = 255), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = 2)) + coord_flip()
pBar

filename <- "dHiAnnoyAllRoughConPermimp"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=8, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))
  
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=8, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

Selected metric

```{r}

allRoughVar <- "UASRoughDW05Ex"

```

##### dImpulsiveness

###### Set variables

```{r}
# Impulsiveness
iVars <- c(allVar, eventVar, ambVar, "dImpulsSHMAvg", "dImpulsSHM05Ex", "dImpulsSHMPowAvg",
           "dImpulsLoudWZAvg", "dImpulsLoudWZ05Ex", "dImpulsLoudWZPowAvg",
           "dImpulsLoudWECMAAvg", "dImpulsLoudWECMA05Ex", "dImpulsLoudWECMAPowAvg", "UASImpulsSHMAvg", "UASImpulsSHM05Ex", "UASImpulsSHMPowAvg", "UASImpulsLoudWZAvg", "UASImpulsLoudWZ05Ex", "UASImpulsLoudWZPowAvg", "UASImpulsLoudWECMAAvg", "UASImpulsLoudWECMA05Ex", "UASImpulsLoudWECMAPowAvg")
dVar <- "dHighAnnoyPc"

seeds <- c(48615, 27684, 58954, 6541346, 98764346)

```

###### Hyperparameter tuning

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}

p <- mtryTune(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2],
             ntrees=ntrees, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)
p

```

Selected hyperparameters

```{r}

ntree <- 251
mtry <- as.integer(length(iVars)/1.5)

```


###### Run model

Train preliminary model

```{r}

nperm <- 5

resultsOutImpuls <- crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2], ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutImpuls$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutImpuls$OOB_MAE
resultsOutImpuls$Rsquared

```

Train multiple seeds model

```{r}

resultsOutImpuls <- multi_crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds, ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutImpuls$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutImpuls$OOB_MAE
resultsOutImpuls$Rsquared

```

```{r}

# store results
resdHiAnnoyFit['All impuls', 'RMSE'] <- resultsOutImpuls$OOB_RMSE
resdHiAnnoyFit['All impuls', 'MAE'] <- resultsOutImpuls$OOB_MAE
resdHiAnnoyFit['All impuls', 'Rsquared'] <- resultsOutImpuls$Rsquared
resdHiAnnoyPermImp$AllImpuls <- resultsOutImpuls$conditional_permimp

```

###### Plot results

```{r, fig.width=8,fig.height=5.6}
par(mai=c(0,3,0,0))

# plot conditional importance
resultsOutImpuls.conimp <- arrange(resultsOutImpuls$conditional_permimp, desc(row_number()))

pBar <- ggplot(resultsOutImpuls.conimp) + geom_col(aes(x=factor(rownames(resultsOutImpuls.conimp), levels=rownames(resultsOutImpuls.conimp)), y=CondPermImp), fill=mycolours[6], width=0.5) + labs(x="Variable", y="Conditional variable permutation importance (% highly annoyed)") + ggtitle("All impulsiveness") + theme(text = element_text(family = "serif"), panel.grid=element_line(color = rgb(235, 235, 235, 100, maxColorValue = 255), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = 2)) + coord_flip()
pBar

filename <- "dHiAnnoyAllImpulsConPermimp"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=8, height=5.6, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))
  
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=8, height=5.6, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

Selected metric

```{r}

allImpulsVar <- "UASImpulsLoudWZPowAvg"

```

#### dSQM and loudness comparison

Now the highest importance dSQMs are ranked against each other, controlling for loudness difference.

##### Include dtonal loudness

###### Set variables

```{r}

iVars <- c(allVar, eventVar, ambVar, allSharpVar, allTonLdVar, allFluctVar, allRoughVar, allImpulsVar)
dVar <- "dHighAnnoyPc"

seeds <- c(619845, 541634, 89, 6536541, 1854)

```

###### Hyperparameter tuning

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}

p <- mtryTune(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2],
             ntrees=ntrees, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)
p

```

Selected hyperparameters

```{r}

ntree <- 5501
mtry <- as.integer(length(iVars)/1.6)

```


###### Run model

Train preliminary model

```{r}

nperm <- 5

resultsOutSQMs1 <- crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2], ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutSQMs1$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutSQMs1$OOB_MAE
resultsOutSQMs1$Rsquared

```

Train multiple seeds model

```{r}

resultsOutSQMs1 <- multi_crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds, ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutSQMs1$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutSQMs1$OOB_MAE
resultsOutSQMs1$Rsquared

```

```{r}

# store results
resdHiAnnoyFit['All SQMs inc tonal loud', 'RMSE'] <- resultsOutSQMs1$OOB_RMSE
resdHiAnnoyFit['All SQMs inc tonal loud', 'MAE'] <- resultsOutSQMs1$OOB_MAE
resdHiAnnoyFit['All SQMs inc tonal loud', 'Rsquared'] <- resultsOutSQMs1$Rsquared
resdHiAnnoyPermImp$AllSQMs1 <- resultsOutSQMs1$conditional_permimp

```

###### Plot results

```{r, fig.width=8,fig.height=2.4}
par(mai=c(0,3,0,0))

# plot conditional importance
resultsOutSQMs1.conimp <- arrange(resultsOutSQMs1$conditional_permimp, desc(row_number()))

pBar <- ggplot(resultsOutSQMs1.conimp) + geom_col(aes(x=factor(rownames(resultsOutSQMs1.conimp), levels=rownames(resultsOutSQMs1.conimp)), y=CondPermImp), fill=mycolours[7], width=0.5) + labs(x="Variable", y="Conditional variable permutation importance (% highly annoyed)") + theme(text = element_text(family = "serif"), panel.grid=element_line(color = rgb(235, 235, 235, 100, maxColorValue = 255), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = 2)) + coord_flip(ylim=c(0, 200))
pBar


filename <- "dHiAnnoyAllSQMsTonLdConPermimp"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=8, height=2.4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))
  
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=8, height=2.4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

##### Exclude tonal loudness

###### Set variables

```{r}

iVars <- c(allVar, eventVar, ambVar, allSharpVar, allTonalVar, allFluctVar, allRoughVar, allImpulsVar)
dVar <- "dHighAnnoyPc"

seeds <- c(418569, 269884, 848116, 4151, 8428)

```

###### Hyperparameter tuning

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}

p <- mtryTune(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2],
             ntrees=ntrees, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)
p

```

Selected hyperparameters

```{r}

ntree <- 1501
mtry <- as.integer(length(iVars)/1.6)

```

###### Run model

Train preliminary model

```{r}

nperm <- 5

resultsOutSQMs2 <- crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2], ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutSQMs2$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutSQMs2$OOB_MAE
resultsOutSQMs2$Rsquared

```

Train multiple seeds model

```{r}

resultsOutSQMs2 <- multi_crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds, ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutSQMs2$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutSQMs2$OOB_MAE
resultsOutSQMs2$Rsquared

```

```{r}

# store results
resdHiAnnoyFit['All SQMs no tonal loud', 'RMSE'] <- resultsOutSQMs2$OOB_RMSE
resdHiAnnoyFit['All SQMs no tonal loud', 'MAE'] <- resultsOutSQMs2$OOB_MAE
resdHiAnnoyFit['All SQMs no tonal loud', 'Rsquared'] <- resultsOutSQMs2$Rsquared
resdHiAnnoyPermImp$AllSQMs2 <- resultsOutSQMs2$conditional_permimp

```

###### Plot results

```{r, fig.width=8,fig.height=2.4}
par(mai=c(0,3,0,0))

# plot conditional importance
resultsOutSQMs2.conimp <- arrange(resultsOutSQMs2$conditional_permimp, desc(row_number()))

pBar <- ggplot(resultsOutSQMs2.conimp) + geom_col(aes(x=factor(rownames(resultsOutSQMs2.conimp), levels=rownames(resultsOutSQMs2.conimp)), y=CondPermImp), fill=mycolours[7], width=0.5) + labs(x="Variable", y="Conditional variable permutation importance (% highly annoyed)") + theme(text = element_text(family = "serif"), panel.grid=element_line(color = rgb(235, 235, 235, 100, maxColorValue = 255), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = 2)) + coord_flip(ylim=c(0, 200))
pBar


filename <- "dHiAnnoyAllSQMsNoTonLdConPermimp"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=8, height=2.4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))
  
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=8, height=2.4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

#### dPsychoacoustic annoyance metrics

##### Set variables

```{r}

iVars <- c(ambVar, "dPsychAnnoyWidmann", "dPsychAnnoyMore", "dPsychAnnoyDi", "dPsychAnnoyTorija", "dPsychAnnoyWillemsen", "dPsychAnnoyBoucher", "UASPsychAnnoyWidmann", "UASPsychAnnoyMore", "UASPsychAnnoyDi", "UASPsychAnnoyTorija", "UASPsychAnnoyWillemsen", "UASPsychAnnoyBoucher")
dVar <- "dHighAnnoyPc"

seeds <- c(9726, 81235, 7235, 320179, 586410)


```

##### Hyperparameter tuning

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}

p <- mtryTune(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2],
              ntrees=ntrees, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)
p

```


Selected hyperparameters

```{r}

ntree <- 501
mtry <-  as.integer(length(iVars)/1.5)

```

##### Run model

Train preliminary model

```{r}

nperm <- 5

resultsOutPA <- crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds[1:2], ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutPA$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutPA$OOB_MAE
resultsOutPA$Rsquared

```

Train multiple seeds model

```{r}

resultsOutPA <- multi_crfReg(dataIn=stimDataNum, iVars=iVars, dVar=dVar, seeds=seeds, ntree=ntree, mtry=mtry, permImpCondThres=permImpCondThres, nperm=nperm, minsplit=minsplit, minbucket=minbucket)

# print model prediction results
resultsOutPA$OOB_RMSE
resultsOutPA$OOB_MAE
resultsOutPA$Rsquared

```

```{r}

# store results
resdHiAnnoyFit['All Psychoacoustic annoyance', 'RMSE'] <- resultsOutPA$OOB_RMSE
resdHiAnnoyFit['All Psychoacoustic annoyance', 'MAE'] <- resultsOutPA$OOB_MAE
resdHiAnnoyFit['All Psychoacoustic annoyance', 'Rsquared'] <- resultsOutPA$Rsquared
resdHiAnnoyPermImp$AllPA <- resultsOutPA$conditional_permimp

```

##### Plot results

```{r, fig.width=8,fig.height=4.4}
par(mai=c(0,3,0,0))

# plot conditional importance
resultsOutPA.conimp <- arrange(resultsOutPA$conditional_permimp, desc(row_number()))

pBar <- ggplot(resultsOutPA.conimp) + geom_col(aes(x=factor(rownames(resultsOutPA.conimp), levels=rownames(resultsOutPA.conimp)), y=CondPermImp), fill=mycolours[10], width=0.5) + labs(x="Variable", y="Conditional variable permutation importance (% highly annoyed)") + theme(text = element_text(family = "serif"), panel.grid=element_line(color = rgb(235, 235, 235, 100, maxColorValue = 255), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = 2)) + coord_flip()
pBar

filename <- "dHiAnnoyAllPAConPermimp"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=8, height=4.4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))
  
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=8, height=4.4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

### Save the results outputs to file

```{r}

if (savedata){
  utils::write.csv(resdHiAnnoyFit, paste(outDataPath, "\\CRFdHiAnnoyOOBFit.csv", sep=""))
  ii <- 0
  temp = list()
  for (res in resdHiAnnoyPermImp){
    ii <- ii + 1
    temp[[ii]] <- as.data.frame(resdHiAnnoyPermImp[ii])
    names(temp[[ii]]) <- names(resdHiAnnoyPermImp[ii])
  }
  openxlsx2::write_xlsx(temp, paste(outDataPath, "\\CRFdHiAnnoyConPermimp.xlsx",
                                   sep=""),
                       rowNames=TRUE)
}

```


## Summary

Summary of results

### With tonal loudness

#### Absolute variables

```{r, fig.width=8, fig.height=4}
# combine the annoyance perm importance results

# convert each result to a tibble with rownames added to a column, renaming the data column to 'dAnnoy' etc.
resdAnnoyMnAbsPermImpTbl <- as.data.frame(resdAnnoyMnPermImp$AbsSQMs1/max(resdAnnoyMnPermImp$AbsSQMs1)) |>
  tibble::rownames_to_column(var='Variable')
colnames(resdAnnoyMnAbsPermImpTbl)[2] <- "dAnnoy"

resdHiAnnoyAbsPermImpTbl <- as.data.frame(resdHiAnnoyPermImp$AbsSQMs1/max(resdHiAnnoyPermImp$AbsSQMs1)) |>
  tibble::rownames_to_column(var='Variable')
colnames(resdHiAnnoyAbsPermImpTbl)[2] <- "dHiAnnoy"

# merge the dataframes
resAbsPermImpTbl <- list(resdAnnoyMnAbsPermImpTbl, resdHiAnnoyAbsPermImpTbl) |>
  purrr::reduce(merge, by = c('Variable'), all = T)

# rename the columns
colnames(resAbsPermImpTbl)[2:3] <- c("Mean change in annoyance", "%HA | HA' (amb.)")
resAbsPermImpTbl[is.na(resAbsPermImpTbl)] <- 0

resAbs <- tidyr::pivot_longer(resAbsPermImpTbl, cols=-Variable, names_to="Outcome", values_to="Imp")

# reorder res tibble, descending by the variable Imp grouped sum and create column with new group order as a factor
resAbs <- resAbs |> mutate(Variable_sum = sum(Imp), .by=Variable) |> arrange(desc(Variable_sum)) |> group_by(Variable_sum, Variable) |>
   mutate(Order = cur_group_id()) |> mutate(Order = as.factor(Order)) |> arrange(desc(Order))

# Reorder outcome levels
resAbs$Outcome <- factor(resAbs$Outcome, levels=c("Mean change in annoyance", "%HA | HA' (amb.)"))

# plot res as horizontal bar chart, with Imp as y axis, Variable as x axis, Outcome as fill, and Variable_sum as order, relabel x axis with Variable names
pBar <- ggplot(resAbs) + geom_col(aes(fill=Outcome, y=Imp, x=Order), colour='grey35', linewidth=0,  width=0.75, show.legend=TRUE) +
  labs(x="Variable", y="Normalised conditional variable\npermutation importance") +
  theme(text = element_text(family = "serif"), panel.grid=element_line(color = rgb(235, 235, 235, 100, maxColorValue = 255), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = 2)) +
  coord_flip(ylim=c(0, 1.2)) + scale_fill_manual(values=mycolours, labels=c(expression(paste(bar(Delta~A))), "%HA | HA' (amb.)")) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels=unique(rev(resAbs$Variable))) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(title='Outcome'))

pBar + scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(0, 1, by=0.5))

filename <- "crfAbsSQMsSummary"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg"), width=8, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg"))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf"), width=8, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf"))
}

```

```{r, fig.width=4, fig.height=4}
# plot res as horizontal bar chart, with Imp as y axis, Variable as x axis, Outcome as fill, and Variable_sum as order, relabel x axis with Variable names
pBar <- ggplot(resAbs) + geom_col(aes(fill=Outcome, y=Imp, x=Order), colour='grey35', linewidth=0,  width=0.75, show.legend=TRUE) +
  labs(x="Variable", y="Normalised conditional variable\npermutation importance") +
  theme(text = element_text(family = "serif"), panel.grid=element_line(color = rgb(235, 235, 235, 100, maxColorValue = 255), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = 2), legend.position = "top") +
  coord_flip(ylim=c(0, 1.2)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=mycolours, labels=c(expression(paste(bar(Delta~A))), "%HA | HA' (amb.)")) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels=unique(rev(resAbs$Variable))) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(title='Outcome', nrow=2, ncol=1))

pBar + scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(0, 1, by=0.5))

filename <- "crfAbsSQMsSummaryNw"

if (saveplots){
```
