```{r, fig.width=4, fig.height=4}
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg"), width=4, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg"))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf"), width=4, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf"))
}

```

#### All variables

```{r, fig.width=8, fig.height=4}
# combine the annoyance perm importance results

# convert each result to a tibble with rownames added to a column, renaming the data column to 'dAnnoy' etc.
resdAnnoyMnAllPermImpTbl <- as.data.frame(resdAnnoyMnPermImp$AllSQMs1/max(resdAnnoyMnPermImp$AllSQMs1)) |>
  tibble::rownames_to_column(var='Variable')
colnames(resdAnnoyMnAllPermImpTbl)[2] <- "dAnnoy"

resdHiAnnoyAllPermImpTbl <- as.data.frame(resdHiAnnoyPermImp$AllSQMs1/max(resdHiAnnoyPermImp$AllSQMs1)) |>
  tibble::rownames_to_column(var='Variable')
colnames(resdHiAnnoyAllPermImpTbl)[2] <- "dHiAnnoy"

# merge the dataframes
resAllPermImpTbl <- list(resdAnnoyMnAllPermImpTbl, resdHiAnnoyAllPermImpTbl) |>
  purrr::reduce(merge, by = c('Variable'), all = T)

# rename the columns
colnames(resAllPermImpTbl)[2:3] <- c("Mean change in annoyance", "%HA | HA' (amb.)")
resAllPermImpTbl[is.na(resAllPermImpTbl)] <- 0

resAll <- tidyr::pivot_longer(resAllPermImpTbl, cols=-Variable, names_to="Outcome", values_to="Imp")

# reorder res tibble, descending by the variable Imp grouped sum and create column with new group order as a factor
resAll <- resAll |> mutate(Variable_sum = sum(Imp), .by=Variable) |> arrange(desc(Variable_sum)) |> group_by(Variable_sum, Variable) |>
   mutate(Order = cur_group_id()) |> mutate(Order = as.factor(Order)) |> arrange(desc(Order))

# Reorder outcome levels
resAll$Outcome <- factor(resAll$Outcome, levels=c("Mean change in annoyance", "%HA | HA' (amb.)"))

# plot res as horizontal bar chart, with Imp as y axis, Variable as x axis, Outcome as fill, and Variable_sum as order, relabel x axis with Variable names
pBar <- ggplot(resAll) + geom_col(aes(fill=Outcome, y=Imp, x=Order), colour='grey35', linewidth=0,  width=0.75, show.legend=TRUE) +
  labs(x="Variable", y="Normalised conditional variable permutation importance") +
  theme(text = element_text(family = "serif"), panel.grid=element_line(color = rgb(235, 235, 235, 100, maxColorValue = 255), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = 2), legend.position = "right") + coord_flip(ylim=c(-0.1, 1.1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=mycolours) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels=unique(rev(resAll$Variable)))

pBar + scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(0, 1, by=0.5))

filename <- "crfAllSQMsSummary"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg"), width=8, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg"))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf"), width=8, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf"))
}


```

### No tonal loudness

#### Absolute variables

```{r, fig.width=8, fig.height=4}
# combine the annoyance perm importance results

# convert each result to a tibble with rownames added to a column, renaming the data column to 'dAnnoy' etc.
resdAnnoyMnAbsPermImpNoTonLdTbl <- as.data.frame(resdAnnoyMnPermImp$AbsSQMs2/max(resdAnnoyMnPermImp$AbsSQMs2)) |>
  tibble::rownames_to_column(var='Variable')
colnames(resdAnnoyMnAbsPermImpNoTonLdTbl)[2] <- "dAnnoy"

resdHiAnnoyAbsPermImpNoTonLdTbl <- as.data.frame(resdHiAnnoyPermImp$AbsSQMs2/max(resdHiAnnoyPermImp$AbsSQMs2)) |>
  tibble::rownames_to_column(var='Variable')
colnames(resdHiAnnoyAbsPermImpNoTonLdTbl)[2] <- "dHiAnnoy"

# merge the dataframes
resAbsPermImpNoTonLdTbl <- list(resdAnnoyMnAbsPermImpNoTonLdTbl, resdHiAnnoyAbsPermImpNoTonLdTbl) |>
  purrr::reduce(merge, by = c('Variable'), all = T)

# rename the columns
colnames(resAbsPermImpNoTonLdTbl)[2:3] <- c("Mean change in annoyance", "%HA | HA' (amb.)")
resAbsPermImpNoTonLdTbl[is.na(resAbsPermImpNoTonLdTbl)] <- 0

resAbsNoTonLd <- tidyr::pivot_longer(resAbsPermImpNoTonLdTbl, cols=-Variable, names_to="Outcome", values_to="Imp")

# reorder res tibble, descending by the variable Imp grouped sum and create column with new group order as a factor
resAbsNoTonLd <- resAbsNoTonLd |> mutate(Variable_sum = sum(Imp), .by=Variable) |> arrange(desc(Variable_sum)) |> group_by(Variable_sum, Variable) |>
   mutate(Order = cur_group_id()) |> mutate(Order = as.factor(Order)) |> arrange(desc(Order))

# Reorder outcome levels
resAbsNoTonLd$Outcome <- factor(resAbsNoTonLd$Outcome, levels=c("Mean change in annoyance", "%HA | HA' (amb.)"))

# plot res as horizontal bar chart, with Imp as y axis, Variable as x axis, Outcome as fill, and Variable_sum as order, relabel x axis with Variable names
pBar <- ggplot(resAbsNoTonLd) + geom_col(aes(fill=Outcome, y=Imp, x=Order), colour='grey35', linewidth=0,  width=0.75, show.legend=TRUE) +
  labs(x="Variable", y="Normalised conditional variable permutation importance") +
  theme(text = element_text(family = "serif"), panel.grid=element_line(color = rgb(235, 235, 235, 100, maxColorValue = 255), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = 2), legend.position = "right") + coord_flip(ylim=c(0, 1.2)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=mycolours) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels=unique(rev(resAbsNoTonLd$Variable)))

pBar + scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(0, 1, by=0.5))


filename <- "crfAbsSQMsNoTonLdSummary"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg"), width=8, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg"))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf"), width=8, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf"))
}

```

#### All variables

```{r, fig.width=8, fig.height=4}
# combine the annoyance perm importance results

# convert each result to a tibble with rownames added to a column, renaming the data column to 'dAnnoy' etc.
resdAnnoyMnAllPermImpNoTonLdTbl <- as.data.frame(resdAnnoyMnPermImp$AllSQMs2/max(resdAnnoyMnPermImp$AllSQMs2)) |>
  tibble::rownames_to_column(var='Variable')
colnames(resdAnnoyMnAllPermImpNoTonLdTbl)[2] <- "dAnnoy"

resdHiAnnoyAllPermImpNoTonLdTbl <- as.data.frame(resdHiAnnoyPermImp$AllSQMs2/max(resdHiAnnoyPermImp$AllSQMs2)) |>
  tibble::rownames_to_column(var='Variable')
colnames(resdHiAnnoyAllPermImpNoTonLdTbl)[2] <- "dHiAnnoy"

# merge the dataframes
resAllPermImpNoTonLdTbl <- list(resdAnnoyMnAllPermImpNoTonLdTbl, resdHiAnnoyAllPermImpNoTonLdTbl) |>
  purrr::reduce(merge, by = c('Variable'), all = T)

# rename the columns
colnames(resAllPermImpNoTonLdTbl)[2:3] <- c("Mean change in annoyance", "%HA | HA' (amb.)")
resAllPermImpNoTonLdTbl[is.na(resAllPermImpNoTonLdTbl)] <- 0

resAllNoTonLd <- tidyr::pivot_longer(resAllPermImpNoTonLdTbl, cols=-Variable, names_to="Outcome", values_to="Imp")

# reorder res tibble, descending by the variable Imp grouped sum and create column with new group order as a factor
resAllNoTonLd <- resAllNoTonLd |> mutate(Variable_sum = sum(Imp), .by=Variable) |> arrange(desc(Variable_sum)) |> group_by(Variable_sum, Variable) |>
   mutate(Order = cur_group_id()) |> mutate(Order = as.factor(Order)) |> arrange(desc(Order))

# Reorder outcome levels
resAllNoTonLd$Outcome <- factor(resAllNoTonLd$Outcome, levels=c("Mean change in annoyance", "%HA | HA' (amb.)"))

# plot res as horizontal bar chart, with Imp as y axis, Variable as x axis, Outcome as fill, and Variable_sum as order, relabel x axis with Variable names
pBar <- ggplot(resAllNoTonLd) + geom_col(aes(fill=Outcome, y=Imp, x=Order), colour='grey35', linewidth=0,  width=0.75, show.legend=TRUE) +
  labs(x="Variable", y="Normalised conditional variable permutation importance") + theme(text = element_text(family = "serif"), panel.grid=element_line(color = rgb(235, 235, 235, 100, maxColorValue = 255), linewidth = 0.25, linetype = 2), legend.position = "right") +
  coord_flip(ylim=c(-0.1, 1.1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=mycolours) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels=unique(rev(resAllNoTonLd$Variable)))

pBar + scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(0, 1, by=0.5))


filename <- "crfAllSQMsNoTonLdSummary"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg"), width=8, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg"))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf"), width=8, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf"))
}

```

### Save the results outputs to file

```{r}
# Make a list of the summary results
resSummary <- list(resAbs, resAll, resAbsNoTonLd, resAllNoTonLd)

# Save the results
if (savedata){
  ii <- 0
  temp = list()
  for (res in resSummary){
    ii <- ii + 1
    temp[[ii]] <- data.frame(resSummary[ii])
  }
  openxlsx2::write_xlsx(temp, paste(outDataPath, "\\CRFSummary.xlsx",
                                   sep=""),
                       rowNames=TRUE)
}

```
